AD_B: Approved Document B (fire safety) — supports compliance with Part B of Schedule 1
AD_F: Approved Document F (ventilation) — supports Part F indoor air quality and extract rates
AD_G: Approved Document G (sanitation, hot water, water efficiency) — supports Part G
AD_K: Approved Document K (protection from falling, collision, impact) — supports Part K
AD_L: Approved Document L (conservation of fuel and power) — supports Part L compliance
AD_M: Approved Document M (access) — supports Part M access and use
AD_O: Approved Document O (overheating) — supports Part O compliance
AD_P: Approved Document P (electrical safety) — supports Part P in dwellings and associated buildings
AI_BC: Approved Inspector — private registered building control body
AOV: Automatic opening vent — smoke ventilation component in common escape routes or shafts
ARB: Architects Registration Board — statutory regulator for use of title architect in UK
As_built: Record information describing constructed works; golden-thread and O&M dependency
BCB: Building Control Body — LABC, approved inspector, or registered building control approver
BCIS: Building Cost Information Service — RICS cost and benchmarking data for UK construction
BEP: BIM Execution Plan — project delivery plan for information management per ISO 19650
BREEAM: Building Research Establishment Environmental Assessment Method
BR_PD: Building Regulations Principal Designer under BSA — design and building work compliance coordination
BSA: Building Safety Act 2022 — establishes Building Safety Regulator, gateways, and golden-thread duties for HRBs
BSR: Building Safety Regulator — HSE-led regulator for HRBs and wider building safety regime
BS_9991: BS 9991 — fire safety in residential buildings; common fire-engineered route alongside AD B
CA_conservation: Conservation Area — planning designation protecting character and appearance of an area
CA_contract: Contract Administrator — party administering JCT-style contracts (often architect)
CDE: Common Data Environment — ISO 19650 controlled repository for project information
CE_NEC: Compensation Event — NEC mechanism for time and cost entitlement
CIL: Community Infrastructure Levy — local authority levy on development to fund infrastructure
CLT: Cross-laminated timber — engineered mass timber structural panel system
CDM: Construction (Design and Management) Regulations 2015 — H&S duties in design and construction
CDM_PC: CDM Principal Contractor — contractor with control over construction phase H&S
CDM_PD: CDM 2015 Principal Designer — health and safety in pre-construction and design phases
COBie: Construction Operations Building Information Exchange — structured handover data for FM
CoC: Certificate of Compliance — formal confirmation that works meet specified standards or approvals
CoW: Certificate of Making Good Defects — JCT stage after defects period demonstrating remedied defects
Collateral_warranty: Third-party duty-of-care deed (e.g. to funder, tenant, purchaser) alongside main contract
CPO: Compulsory Purchase Order — statutory land acquisition for public benefit schemes
DEC: Display Energy Certificate — public building operational energy rating
DER: Dwelling Emission Rate — actual design emissions compared against TER
DfMA: Design for Manufacture and Assembly — design optimised for factory/production
DLP: Defects Liability Period — post-PC period for contractor to remedy notified defects
EIA: Environmental Impact Assessment — statutory process for significant environmental effects
EIR: Exchange Information Requirements — employer information requirements per ISO 19650
EPC: Energy Performance Certificate — asset rating for sale/let of buildings
EOT: Extension of Time — contract mechanism for delay relief
ES: Environmental Statement — EIA reporting document submitted with planning application
FIDIC: International Federation of Consulting Engineers contract suite used on some UK projects
Final_account: Contractual close-out of sums due after PC, variations, and defects adjustments
FRR: Fire resistance rating — period (minutes) a element withstands fire exposure (e.g. 60/90/120)
FSC: Fire safety certificate — BSR completion evidence for occupation of higher-risk buildings
Gateway_1: Planning gateway for HRBs — BSR consultation before planning permission
Gateway_2: Building Control gateway before construction of HRBs — design must meet functional requirements
Gateway_3: Completion gateway for HRBs — golden thread and as-built evidence before occupation
GEA: Gross External Area — total enclosed area including external wall thickness
GIA: Gross Internal Area — total enclosed area to internal face of external walls
Golden_thread: Structured, auditable record of building safety information from design through occupation
GPDO: General Permitted Development Order — planning PD rights in England
HIA: Heritage Impact Assessment — structured assessment of effect on heritage assets
HRB: Higher-risk building under Building Safety Act 2022 (typically residential ≥18m or ≥7 storeys, subject to regulations)
HSE: Health and Safety Executive — regulator for workplace H&S including construction
HS_file: Health and safety file — CDM handover record of residual risks for future works
IPMS: International Property Measurement Standards — area measurement basis
IPMS_2: IPMS 2 Office — internal dominant portion area basis for office measurement
IPMS_3: IPMS 3 — component areas (e.g. limited use, shared) for granular reporting
ISO_19650: ISO 19650 — information management using BIM principles
Issued_for_Construction: IFC drawing/status — information approved for contractor to build from
JCT: Joint Contracts Tribunal standard forms (e.g. JCT Design & Build 2024)
JCT_D_and_B: JCT Design and Build — single contractor design-and-build procurement route
LABC: Local Authority Building Control — council building control service
LBC: Listed Building Consent — planning permission for works to listed buildings
LDs: Liquidated damages — pre-agreed damages for delay (contract-specific)
LDC: Lawful Development Certificate — confirms PD or existing lawful use
LETI: London Energy Transformation Initiative — voluntary operational/embodied carbon targets
LOIN: Level of Information Need — ISO 19650 definition of required information granularity
LPA: Local Planning Authority — decides planning applications and enforcement
MEP: Mechanical, electrical, and public health — building services engineering discipline
MIDP: Master Information Delivery Plan — consolidated delivery plans per ISO 19650
MMC: Modern Methods of Construction — offsite, platform, or innovative systems
MVHR: Mechanical ventilation with heat recovery — whole-dwelling ventilation with heat exchange
NBS: National Building Specification — UK specification and product description system
NCR: Non-conformance report — quality defect record on site
NEC4: New Engineering Contract fourth edition — option-based construction contracts
NHBC: National House Building Council — warranty and technical standards for new homes
NIA: Net Internal Area — usable area excluding common parts and structure
NPPF: National Planning Policy Framework — England planning policy (Wales/Scotland have separate frameworks)
NRA: Net Rentable Area — lettable commercial floor area excluding common parts
O_and_M: Operations and maintenance manuals — handover documentation for building operation
Part_B: Building Regulations Part B (fire safety) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_F: Building Regulations Part F (ventilation) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_G: Building Regulations Part G (sanitation and water) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_K: Building Regulations Part K (protection from falling) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_L: Building Regulations Part L (conservation of fuel and power) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_M: Building Regulations Part M (access) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_O: Building Regulations Part O (overheating) — Schedule 1 requirement
Part_P: Building Regulations Part P (electrical safety) — Schedule 1 requirement in scope dwellings
PC: Practical completion — stage when works are substantially complete per contract
PCSA: Pre-Construction Services Agreement — early contractor involvement before main contract
PD_rights: Permitted Development — development allowed without full planning application within GPDO limits
PHPP: Passive House Planning Package — energy model for Passivhaus certification
PI: Professional indemnity insurance — practice liability cover
PoE: Post-Occupancy Evaluation — review of performance against design intent after occupation
PSC: Professional Services Contract — JCT form for consultant appointments
PSI_value: Psi value — linear thermal transmittance of a thermal bridge (W/m·K)
QS: Quantity Surveyor / cost consultant — measures and manages construction cost
RBAC: Registered Building Control Approver — registered person/organisation undertaking building control
Reg_38: Regulation 38 — fire safety information handover to responsible person at completion
Retention: Contract sum withheld until defects period end or CoW — cash-flow and performance security
RIBA_PoW: RIBA Plan of Work 2020 — UK industry stage framework (0–7)
RICS: Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors — professional body for surveyors and cost advice
RFI: Request for information — clarification during construction
SAM: Scheduled Ancient Monument — statutory protection for archaeological sites
SAP: Standard Assessment Procedure — dwelling energy and carbon assessment
SBEM: Simplified Building Energy Model — non-domestic energy assessment
S104: Section 104 agreement — adoption of sewers under Water Industry Act (developer infrastructure)
S278: Section 278 agreement — works to public highway (access, alterations) under Highways Act
S38: Section 38 agreement — adoption of new estate roads by highway authority
s106: Section 106 planning obligation — developer contributions and restrictions
SFS: Steel framing system — lightweight steel infill framing for external walls
TER: Target Emission Rate — Part L notional building benchmark for new dwellings
TIDP: Task Information Delivery Plan — discipline-specific information delivery per ISO 19650
TM52: CIBSE TM52 — legacy overheating criteria; largely superseded by TM59 for dwellings
TM54: CIBSE TM54 — operational energy forecasting for non-domestic buildings
TM59: CIBSE TM59 — dynamic overheating assessment supporting Part O compliance
TM65: CIBSE TM65 — embodied carbon assessment methodology for building services equipment
TPO: Tree Preservation Order — planning control on works to protected trees
U_value: Thermal transmittance (W/m²K) — fabric heat loss metric under Part L
Uniclass: Unified classification for the UK construction industry — supports specifications and BIM
VO: Variation Order — instructed change to contract works under JCT-style contracts
WLC: Whole Life Carbon — sum of upfront, use-stage, and end-of-life greenhouse gas emissions
air_permeability: Building airtightness at 50 Pa — q50 target (m³/h·m²) under Part L pressure testing
q50: Air permeability at 50 Pa — common shorthand for airtightness test result
use_class: Town and Country Planning Use Class — e.g. C3 dwellinghouses, E commercial, B2 general industrial
Chapter_8: Traffic signs manual Chapter 8 — UK standard for temporary traffic management at road works
DIAN: Dial Before You Dig — utility record enquiry before excavation
F10: HSE F10 form — notification of notifiable construction project under CDM 2015
FSO: Fire Safety Order 2005 — regulatory reform fire safety; responsible person duties for occupied buildings
NRM1: RICS NRM1 — order of cost estimating and cost planning for capital building works
NRM2: RICS NRM2 — detailed measurement for building works (BoQ)
Openreach: UK telecom infrastructure provider — cable protection and diversion coordination
Party_Wall: Party Wall etc. Act 1996 — notices and awards for work on or near boundaries
RIDDOR: Reporting of Injuries, Diseases and Dangerous Occurrences Regulations — HSE accident reporting
RACI: Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed — responsibility assignment matrix
Responsible_person: Person with control of premises under FSO — fire safety duties on occupation
TMP: Traffic Management Plan — construction-phase highway/traffic accommodation plan
TfL: Transport for London — highway and street works authority for London red routes
TIA: Traffic Impact Assessment — planning-stage transport study
AFC: Approved for Construction — ISO 19650 information status for buildable issue
S0: ISO 19650 status S0 — work in progress, not yet suitable for coordination
S2: ISO 19650 status S2 — suitable for information, shared for coordination
CR: Construction readiness — ISO 19650 status indicating build readiness review
Exceptionally_adverse_weather: JCT relevant event — weather beyond normal for time of year; EOT assessment required
Management_contracting: Procurement route — construction manager coordinates trade packages
Traditional_procurement: Design complete before tender; employer retains design responsibility
Target_cost: NEC4 Option C — shared pain/gain on actual vs forecast cost
Sectional_completion: Contract mechanism allowing PC of defined parts before whole works complete
Adoption_agreement: Highways or drainage adoption — S38/S104/S278 infrastructure handover to authority
LOLER: Lifting Operations and Lifting Equipment Regulations — thorough examination for lifts
Commissioning: Testing and setting-to-work of building services and fire systems before handover
Look_ahead: Short-interval construction programme (typically 4 weeks) for trade coordination
Hold_point: Programmed inspection gate — work must not proceed until witness/approval
PCI: Pre-construction information — CDM information pack before construction starts
F214: HSE form for reporting dangerous occurrences — RIDDOR related
Employers_Agent: NEC role — employer's representative administering the contract
Project_Manager: NEC role — administers contract, assesses compensation events
BoQ: Bill of Quantities — measured items for tender pricing per NRM2
Cost_plan: Elemental cost breakdown by RIBA stage per NRM1
Transmittal: Formal issue record listing documents sent to recipient with action required
Stage_freeze: Design change control gate — no changes without approved change request
Issue_pack: Coordinated set of documents issued to defined recipient with transmittal cover
